artifact.content_preview:
STATEMENT OF WORK
PROJECT: NGIS PHASE 3 — DATA CENTRE CONSOLIDATION
Document Number: SOW-NGIS-P3-2024-001
Version: 2.1
Date: September 15, 2024
Contracting Authority: Shared Services Canada (SSC)
Classification: Protected B

---

1. BACKGROUND AND CONTEXT

Shared Services Canada (SSC) is undertaking the Next-Generation
Infrastructure Strategy (NGIS) Phase 3, which involves the consolidation
of three Government of Canada (GC) data centre facilities into a single
modernized enterprise data centre.

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare Project Management Plan
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-001: Project Management Plan — Due: October 31, 2024

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare Technical Design Document (TDD)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD) — Due: December 15, 2024

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package — Due: January 31, 2025

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare Migration Runbook for Sites B and C
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C) — Due: February 28, 2025

extracted_tasks.text: Prepare User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan — Due: March 10, 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Complete Site A Consolidation and Go-Live
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live) — Due: April 30, 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Submit Post-Migration Validation Report
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report — Due: May 31, 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Submit Project Closure Report
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: D-008: Project Closure Report — Due: June 30, 2026

extracted_tasks.text: Decommission Sites B and C physical infrastructure
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure

extracted_tasks.text: Migrate all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A

extracted_tasks.text: Replace and deploy Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites

extracted_tasks.text: Migrate all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A

extracted_tasks.text: Provide weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office

extracted_tasks.text: Provide monthly steering committee presentations
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Steering committee presentations (monthly)

extracted_tasks.text: Maintain risk register
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Risk register maintenance

extracted_tasks.text: Decide to exclude end-user device refresh from this SOW (addressed under NGIS Phase 4)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: End-user device refresh or replacement ... is addressed under a separate procurement vehicle (NGIS Phase 4)

extracted_tasks.text: Decide to exclude application modernization; only lift and shift migration allowed
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Applications will be migrated as-is (lift and shift only)

extracted_tasks.text: Decide to exclude GC-Cloud workload migration from this SOW
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: migration of any workloads to public cloud environments ... is out of scope

extracted_tasks.text: Decide that departmental end-user training is the responsibility of client departments
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: departmental training programs for end users are the responsibility of client departments

extracted_tasks.text: Decide to defer network monitoring tool upgrades to a separate initiative
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: upgrades to the network operations centre (NOC) monitoring platform are deferred to a separate initiative

llm_calls.content:
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office",
    "Steering committee presentations (monthly)",
    "Risk register maintenance",
    "Change management and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration to public cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and change management beyond project communications",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "Project Management Plan",
    "Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget cap of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Budget variance exceeding 15% requires formal amendment and Treasury Board submission",
    "Go-Live deadline no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date no later than June 30, 2026",
    "Extensions beyond June 30, 2026 require ADM-level approval",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)",
    "Compliance with Official Languages Act for client-facing deliverables",
    "All scope changes require written approval from the Project Sponsor and impact assessment"
  ]
}

in_scope: Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure
Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A
Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A
Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A
Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites
Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones
BGP routing table migration and validation
Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to consolidated infrastructure at Site A
AD schema extension and forest restructuring
Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing
Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD
Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
out_of_scope: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
GC-Cloud workload migration to public cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)
End-user training and change management beyond project communications
constraints: Total approved budget cap of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes
Budget variance exceeding 15% requires formal amendment and Treasury Board submission
Go-Live deadline no later than April 30, 2026
Final project closure date no later than June 30, 2026
Extensions beyond June 30, 2026 require ADM-level approval
Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management
Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy
Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security
Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)
Compliance with Official Languages Act for client-facing deliverables
All scope changes require written approval from the Project Sponsor and impact assessment
